column1: # mapping_set_title: "GDSC reusable Kobo form to Schema.org (Doug base + vector/raster additions)"

# mapping_set_description: "Reusable SSSOM from the KoboToolbox authoring form to Science-on-Schema.org. Human-reviewed base plus additions for raster, temporal, and record-specific fields. Field-level, record-number-agnostic. AI-assisted; human curation required."

column13: comment

Each Kobo submission becomes one Schema.org Dataset. Emit @id from etl_group/table_name as https://gdsc.idsc.miami.edu/detail/{table_name}. Extend @context with qudt, xsd, pato and set @language to en.
Kobo title is the Schema.org Dataset name.
Dataset abstract or description.
Emit {"@type":"PropertyValue","propertyID":"https://registry.identifiers.org/registry/doi","value":"doi:{value}","url":"https://doi.org/{value}"}.
Dataset landing page URL.
Map known Kobo license codes to full URIs: cc_by→https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by/4.0/, cc0→https://creativecommons.org/publicdomain/zero/1.0/, etc.
Language code.
Publication date.
Last data update.
Map creator_name→Organization.name, creator_affiliation→Organization description; wrap each in a Role object with roleName=creator.
Map publisher_name→Organization.name; resolve known institutions to ROR @id (University of Miami GDSC→https://ror.org/02y3ad647).
Map coverage_name→Place.name; build additionalProperty with GeoNames link from coverage_identifier and coverage_identifier_schema_uri. Bounding box geo.box must be supplied externally.
Subject terms are discoverability keywords.
Split on space; each token becomes a DataCatalog with @id=https://gdsc.idsc.miami.edu/?collection={token}. Always prepend root GDSC DataCatalog entry (https://gdsc.idsc.miami.edu).
Emit DefinedTerm with termCode=value (vector/table/raster); inDefinedTermSet pointing to GDSC dataRepresentation vocab.
Emit DefinedTerm with termCode=value (polygon, point, etc.); inDefinedTermSet pointing to GDSC vector geometry vocab.
Append to spatialCoverage.additionalProperty as PropertyValue with name=Spatial Reference System and full OGC SRS URI as value.
Emit {"@type":"DataDownload","name":"Source distribution","contentUrl":value}; merge with format and extension mappings.
Gaia/PostGIS table name is operational metadata.
zip should become application/zip or remain as source extension.
shp describes the source data format.
Update frequency maps to Dublin Core accrual periodicity.

[APPROACH E] Maps attribute_name→name, attribute_description→description, attribute_type→qudt:dataType, attribute_unit→unitText, attribute_unit_concept_id→unitCode, attribute_concept_id→alternateName, temporal interval, attribute_external_id→identifier PropertyValue.
Derive ISO 8601 interval string (min start_date/max end_date) across all attribute temporal metadata fields.
If rights URI contains creativecommons.org or license code is cc_by/cc0, emit boolean true.
[APPROACH B] Operational catalog ID from control_group/id. Works with existing property_value rule; alternative A would map to schema:identifier as a second PropertyValue with propertyID=kobo.

[APPROACH B→D] record_136 has ohdsi;5150. Today emitted as additionalProperty; PROPOSED_RULE external_id_propertyvalue would parse registry;code pairs into typed PropertyValue objects on $.identifier.
[APPROACH A] Human-readable license text maps to schema:usageInfo (complements license URI from license code). Pass-through string rule works today.

[APPROACH A] Attribution/usage constraints. Multiple rows target usageInfo — transformer accumulates into array. Alternative B would use additionalProperty:name=restrictions to keep license_text separate.
[APPROACH A] Dublin Core provenance statement (Direct from source). Requires dct prefix in @context (already emitted by create_dataset_object_with_id).
Pass-through Kobo resource_type code (e.g. vector_dataset) as a plain additionalType string per schema.org Text or URL expectation.
[APPROACH G] Suppresses placeholder values (--, TBD, not_applicable) via skip_if rule chain; record_136 relation_title is omitted from output.
[APPROACH E] Sub-field of creator_group not consumed by role_organization_array. Could extend that rule to set Organization.@type from creator_type; interim B uses additionalProperty.
[APPROACH C] derived/raw as DefinedTerm on measurementTechnique alongside structure and geometry vocab terms.
[APPROACH B+G] ISO lineage suppressed when TBD; record_136 omits this row from output.
[APPROACH B+G] ETL process step suppressed when placeholder.
[APPROACH B+G] Processing agent suppressed when placeholder.
[APPROACH B] Symbology hint (name field used as map label). Gaia-specific; no schema.org equivalent.
[APPROACH B+G] Symbology value field suppressed when placeholder (-- in record_136).
[APPROACH D] PROPOSED_RULE no_data_propertyvalue would emit {type,value} pair (-9999 int). Interim property_value flattens dict to string repr; needs new rule for structured output.
[APPROACH B] gdsc_get_attributes — Gaia query hook; maps to operational metadata not discovery metadata.
[APPROACH B] Reuses srs_propertyvalue for analytic EPSG:3857 (distinct from storage EPSG:4326 on spatialCoverage).
[APPROACH B] sql shp tokens. PROPOSED_RULE split_space_to_array or derivative_datadownload_objects would emit extra DataDownload entries on $.distribution.
[APPROACH D] sponsor_organization_array emits Organization objects with name and url for each sponsor_group entry (TuftsCTSI, IDSC, Library in record_136).
[APPROACH C] Publication status (draft/published) to schema:creativeWorkStatus. TEAM CHANGE from measurementTechnique; Doug informed.
[APPROACH A] Free-text disclaimer separate from description. record_136 has no disclaimers — still maps cleanly.
[APPROACH B] not_applicable in record_136. Operational ETL routing metadata.
[APPROACH B+G] ETL parameters suppressed when placeholder (-- in record_136).
[APPROACH B] wget/curl etc. Could enrich datadownload_source rule to set acquisitionProtocol.
[APPROACH D] PROPOSED_RULE file_name_objects:archive=field,file=field would attach name/contentUrl to distribution. Interim row is lossy on nested file_name_group.
[APPROACH B+G] Bash ETL script suppressed when TBD placeholder.
[APPROACH B+G] SQL transform suppressed when TBD placeholder.

[APPROACH F] Intentional non-mapping. Kobo system fields (_id, _uuid, _submission_time, _submitted_by, _status, _geolocation, _tags, _notes, _validation_status, _xform_id_string, __version__, formhub/uuid, meta/instanceID, meta/rootUuid) are envelope metadata — not dataset description. Document via skos:noMatch rather than silently dropping.
[APPROACH F] Kobo attachment array is submission infrastructure. If media files are needed, map specific etl_group/source instead.
D: RASTER ONLY. Band group to variableMeasured; no-ops on vector.
B: RASTER ONLY. Pixel dimension.
B: RASTER ONLY. Dimension units.
A: Temporal start bound.
A: Temporal end bound.
B: Bounding-box extent.
G: Checksum; suppress placeholder else additionalProperty.
G: Pod id; suppress placeholder.
G: 'up' flag; suppress placeholder.
G: Custom parameters; suppress placeholder.
D: Columns group to variableMeasured (record-specific).
B: Index fields group.
G/PENDING: Service definition; curator to confirm target.
A: Thumbnail URL to schema:image.
